title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at FreeCharge

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at FreeCharge
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
